title: melaleuca × arenicola
intro: Melaleuca × arenicola, also known as the sand cypress or coastal tea tree, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the myrtle family (Myrtaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and providing relief from respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, melaleuca × arenicola is often used in teas, essential oils, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
